globalNews.title: Armenia votes as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
globalNews.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

globalNews.summary: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.

cryptoNews.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
cryptoNews.summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

cryptoNews.title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base

cryptoNews.title: Crypto tax proposals weighed ahead of Tuesday House hearing
cryptoNews.summary: Among the issues US lawmakers are expected to discuss in a digital asset taxation hearing are “de minimis” reporting exceptions for crypto transactions.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin bears face $2.6B trap as BTC funding rate drops: Is a short squeeze brewing?
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin bears piled into short positions as BTC price slid to $60,000. Will the $2.6 billion in short leverage lead to an upside squeeze?

aiNews.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
aiNews.summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
